---
title: "Research"
---

# Research

My research sits at the intersection of health economics, behavioural economics, preference measurement and applied policy evaluation.

<div class="grid grid-2">
<div class="card"><h3>Health preference research</h3><p>Discrete choice experiments and stated preference methods to understand patient, public and clinician preferences in healthcare.</p><span class="tag">DCE</span><span class="tag">MXL</span><span class="tag">Latent class</span></div>
<div class="card"><h3>Information processing</h3><p>Eye tracking, numeracy, feedback, dominance tasks and attention measures to understand how people process health information.</p><span class="tag">Eye tracking</span><span class="tag">Decision quality</span></div>
<div class="card"><h3>Public health policy</h3><p>Preference and policy acceptability studies in vaccination, mandates, pandemic responses, telehealth and prevention.</p><span class="tag">Vaccine mandates</span><span class="tag">Telehealth</span></div>
<div class="card"><h3>Value assessment</h3><p>Equity, efficiency, distributional concerns and preference-based approaches to health technology and policy evaluation.</p><span class="tag">HTA</span><span class="tag">Equity</span></div>
</div>

## Fields

- Health economics
- Behavioural economics
- Discrete choice experiments
- Health preference research
- Eye-tracking and information processing
- Health policy and technology assessment
- Decision tools and applied economic evaluation
